title: Maintain nursery plants
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain nursery plants demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

pcs.text: Determine work requirements from workplace instructions
